hook.text: A half-finished feature is in main. You can't release because users would see broken UI. Feature flags fix this.

buildup.text: A feature flag wraps new code in an if-statement. Flag off means the old behavior. Flag on means the new one.

discovery.text: Deploy the code with the flag off. Users see nothing different. Turn it on for 5% of users first. Test safely.

twist.text: Flags decouple deployment from release. Ship code anytime. Reveal features when the business is ready.

climax.text: LaunchDarkly and Unleash manage flags at scale. Kill switches for features become instant rollback tools.

punchline.text: Deploy dark, release bright. Feature flags decouple the two.

quiz.question: What do feature flags decouple?
options: Deployment of code from release of features to users
